title: Fireroad Launches Fund I to Back Founders Building for the Real Economy
author: Fireroad
excerpt: Fireroad announces its inaugural fund focused on technology for small businesses across construction, healthcare, logistics, and more.
body: Fireroad is proud to announce the launch of Fund I, dedicated to backing founders building technology for the backbone of the economy. Our focus is on entrepreneurs who deeply understand the industries they serve — from construction and manufacturing to healthcare and logistics. We believe the next generation of great software companies will be built by people who have lived the problems they are solving.

title: Why the Real Economy Needs Better Technology
author: Tim Metzner
excerpt: Small businesses power local economies but have been underserved by technology for decades. That is about to change.
body: For decades, the best technology has been built for large enterprises and venture-backed startups. Small businesses — the contractors, manufacturers, restaurants, and healthcare practices that employ millions of people — have been left behind. But a new wave of founders is emerging. These are operators who have run businesses in these industries and understand the real problems. Armed with modern development tools and artificial intelligence, they can now build powerful software faster than ever before.

title: The Rise of Industry Insider Founders
author: Christy Johnson
excerpt: The best founders building technology for small businesses come from inside the industries they serve.
body: We are seeing a fundamental shift in who builds software companies. The founders we back at Fireroad are not typical Silicon Valley technologists. They are operators who have managed construction projects, run logistics companies, and overseen healthcare practices. They understand the workflows, pain points, and opportunities that outsiders simply cannot see. This deep industry knowledge, combined with increasingly accessible technology tools, creates an unprecedented opportunity to build transformative software.
